faqs.question: How do I know if I have a silverfish problem in my Mott Haven home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include spotting live silverfish in bathrooms or kitchens (especially at night), finding small holes in paper products or fabrics, noticing yellow stains on books or walls, and discovering their pepper-like droppings. Silverfish prefer dark, humid areas like basements, closets, and under sinks.

faqs.question: What does silverfish control service include in Mott Haven?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough inspection to identify harborage areas, targeted treatment of all affected zones using professional-grade products, elimination of moisture sources that attract silverfish, sealing of entry points, and follow-up visits to ensure complete eradication. We also provide prevention tips specific to your property.

faqs.question: Are silverfish treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe when applied by our trained professionals. We take extra precautions in homes with children and pets, and provide clear instructions on any temporary safety measures. Most treatments allow you to remain in your home during and after service.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide silverfish control service in Mott Haven?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Mott Haven and the Bronx. Most silverfish treatments take 1-2 hours depending on the size of your property and severity of infestation. You'll typically see a significant reduction in silverfish activity within the first week, with complete elimination within 2-3 weeks.
